description: JSON values that from_json must reject with Error::InvalidInput for a reason other than the hash hex. Each `value` is the raw JSON passed to from_json. Where a hash is present it is the canonical all-zeros hash, so the failure is attributable to the object shape or the height alone.

malformed.name: not_an_object
malformed.reason: a JSON array is not an object

malformed.name: negative_height
malformed.reason: height is negative and not an unsigned integer

malformed.name: fractional_height
malformed.reason: height is fractional and not an integer

malformed.name: string_height
malformed.reason: height is a string, not a number
